# Time-series anomaly datasets — fixture subset

## A1. Curated subset

- **The Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) v1.1** — github.
  - **Source:** https://github.com/numenta/NAB
  - **Access:** direct; auth_required: N
  - **Schema:** schema_url: https://github.com/numenta/NAB/blob/master/data/README.md
  - **Size+License:** ~50MB; MIT
  - **Tasks:** time-series anomaly detection
  - **Status:** Verified.

- **NASA SMAP & MSL spacecraft telemetry anomalies (telemanom)** — github.
  - **Source:** https://github.com/khundman/telemanom
  - **Access:** API; auth_required: Y
  - **Schema:** see dataset card / source page
  - **Size+License:** ~70MB; Apache-2.0
  - **Tasks:** time-series anomaly detection
  - **Status:** Verified.

- **Server Machine Dataset (SMD)** — github.
  - **Source:** https://github.com/NetManAIOps/OmniAnomaly
  - **Access:** direct; auth_required: N
  - **Schema:** see dataset card / source page
  - **Size+License:** ~150MB; MIT
  - **Tasks:** time-series anomaly detection
  - **Status:** Verified.

- **Skoltech Anomaly Benchmark (SKAB) v0.9** — github.
  - **Source:** https://github.com/waico/SKAB
  - **Access:** direct; auth_required: N
  - **Schema:** see dataset card / source page
  - **Size+License:** ?; GPL-3.0
  - **Tasks:** time-series anomaly detection
  - **Status:** Verified.

- **TODS: An Automated Time Series Outlier Detection System** — github.
  - **Source:** https://github.com/datamllab/tods
  - **Access:** direct; auth_required: N
  - **Schema:** see dataset card / source page
  - **Size+License:** ?; Apache-2.0
  - **Tasks:** time-series anomaly detection
  - **Status:** Verified.

- **Timeseries-PILE (multi-domain time series corpus including TSB-UAD anomaly subset)** — huggingface.
  - **Source:** https://huggingface.co/datasets/AutonLab/Timeseries-PILE
  - **Access:** hf datasets; auth_required: N
  - **Schema:** schema_url: https://huggingface.co/datasets/AutonLab/Timeseries-PILE
  - **Size+License:** 20.085GB; MIT
  - **Tasks:** time-series anomaly detection
  - **Status:** Verified.

- **Controlled Anomalies Time Series (CATS) Dataset** — zenodo.
  - **Source:** https://zenodo.org/records/8338435
  - **Access:** direct; auth_required: N
  - **Schema:** see dataset card / source page
  - **Size+License:** 2.0GB; CC-BY-4.0
  - **Tasks:** time-series anomaly detection
  - **Status:** Verified.

- **controlled-anomalies-time-series-dataset (HF mirror of CATS)** — huggingface.
  - **Source:** https://huggingface.co/datasets/patrickfleith/controlled-anomalies-time-series-dataset
  - **Access:** hf datasets; auth_required: N
  - **Schema:** schema_url: https://huggingface.co/datasets/patrickfleith/controlled-anomalies-time-series-dataset
  - **Size+License:** 1.47GB; CC-BY-4.0
  - **Tasks:** time-series anomaly detection
  - **Status:** Verified.

- **MGAB: The Mackey-Glass Anomaly Benchmark** — zenodo.
  - **Source:** https://zenodo.org/records/3760086
  - **Access:** direct; auth_required: N
  - **Schema:** see dataset card / source page
  - **Size+License:** 49.8MB; CC0-1.0
  - **Tasks:** time-series anomaly detection
  - **Status:** Verified.

- **The UCR Time Series Classification Archive (2018)** — uci.
  - **Source:** https://www.cs.ucr.edu/~eamonn/time_series_data_2018/
  - **Access:** direct; auth_required: N
  - **Schema:** see dataset card / source page
  - **Size+License:** ~260MB; custom
  - **Tasks:** time-series anomaly detection
  - **Status:** Verified.

- **New York City Taxi and Limousine Commission (TLC) Trip Record Data** — aws_open_data.

  - **Access:** direct; auth_required: N
  - **Schema:** see dataset card / source page
  - **Size+License:** ?; custom
